TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Idriss_D√©by, title = Idriss_D√©by, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Idriss_D√©by} }

S.FORM: I 1952 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 18 a romi'ad masofoc ci Idriss D√©by , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Chad anini i ci Idriss D√©by, patirengan a romi'ad i 1990 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 2 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i i…¨~…ģriss …¨~…ģ*b~b~vj , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶ńßa…¨~…ģ anini i ¶i i…¨~…ģriss …¨~…ģ*b~b~vj, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
